summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is explicitly an inventory shard. Eight open non-security PRs should stay open for maintainer/review/proof follow-up, one open security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling, and one already-closed security-sensitive PR is recorded as routed/read-only context.

actions.reason: Valid focused fix candidate, but merge is blocked by plan mode and maintainer-review gates.

Open security-sensitive SecretRef/token handling item must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling and kept out of ProjectClownfish cleanup.
